verses.text: Hannah in zong thu ngenin, “ Topa' tungah ka lungdam a, Topa' hangin ka kipak hi. Nong huhna hangin ka galte ka nuihsan hi
“ Topa bangin a siangtho kuamah dang omlo a, amah simloh kuamah dang omlo a, i Pasian tawh a kibang hong hu dang omlo hi
Tua bangin kiphatsakna tawh pau nawn kei in la, na kamsung pan kihihsakna gingkhiasak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thei Pasian hi a, amah in gamtatnate a tawi khai hi
A thahatte' thalte kitan a, ahih hangin a thanemte in thahatna ngah uh hi
A gilvahte in an thalawh uh a, ahih hangin a gilkialte kial nawnlo uh hi. Tasel mi in ta sagih nei a, ahih hangin ta tampi a neinu a lungzuang hi
Topa in thatin hingsak kik a, amah in Leinuai-ah paipih sukin thotosak hi
Topa in zawngsakin hausak a, amah in niamkhiat sukin, zong sangtosak hi

Amah in leivui panin mizawngte phongto a, amah in a cimawhte a lungkhamna panun a phongto hi. Uliante tawh tukhawmsak a, minphatna ngahsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khuampite Topa-a' hi a, tuate tungah amah in leitung pumpi a koih hi
“Amah in a thuman mite' kalsuanna limtakin cing a, ahih hangin migilote khuamialna sungah kikhiasuk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thatang hatna tawh mi gualzo lo ding hi

Topa' langte tamkham ding a, amah in amaute do-in vantungah van gingsak ding hi. Topa in leimong dongah thu khen ding hi. Amah in ama kumpipa tungah thahatna pia ding a, a sathau nilhpa' vangliatna sangsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Ramah-a a inn-ah Elkanah a ciah hi. Ahi zongin naupang in siampi Eli' omna-ah Topa' na a sem hi.
Eli' tapate pen bangmah a manlo mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in Topa zahtakna neilo uh hi
Mite' tungah siampite' gamtat zia ding ngeinate donlo uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin a sa a huan laitakin siampipa' nasempa sikkeu-ka-thum nei khat a khutah tawi-in hong pai a

amah in a sikkeu tawh sikbeel dai ahi a, beel-uk ahi a, beelpi ahi a, beel sungah ahi zongin sunsuk hi. Sikkeuka in a kaihkhiattoh khempeuh siampipa in tang ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin Shiloh-ah a pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah amaute in tua bangin hih uh hi

Tua thamloin a thau a kihal ma-in siampipa' nasempa hong pai-in biakna a pia mipa kiangah, “Siampipa-a' ding han' ding sa hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nang tung panin sa minsa hong sangloin a sial bek hong sang ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin mipa in ama kiangah, “A thau hong hal masa sak in la, tua khit ciangin na deih zahzah la in,” ci leh, amah in, “Hilo hi; tu mahmahin nong pia ding uh hi. Tua hi kei leh thatanghat thu-in kong laksak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' muhna-ah tangvalte' khialhna lian mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa' tungah biakpiaknate thupi sehlo uh hi
Samuel pen saihadial siampipuan silhin Topa' mai-ah na a sem naupang khat ahi hi
Samuel' nu a pasal tawh kumsim biakna pia dingin a paitoh ciangin ama-a' dingin puantual neu khat bawlin kum simin ama kiangah a puak hi

Tua ciangin Eli in Elkanah leh a zi thupha pia-in, “Amah in Topa' tungah a apkik a ta' tangdingin Topa in hih numei tawh nang ta dang hong neisak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a inn uhah amaute a ciah uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Hannah thupha pia a, tuanu gai-in tanu nih leh tapa thum a nei hi. Naupang Samuel ahih leh Topa' omna-ah a khang hi
Tu-in Eli teek mahmah a, Israel-te khempeuh tungah a tapate' gamtatnate, leh kikhopna buk lutna-ah na a sem numeite tawh a lupkhopna thute khempeuh zong a za hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Mi khempeuh tung panin na gamtat siatnate uh ka za hi
Hilo hi, ka tapate aw; Topa' mite in a genthangna thu ka zakte hoihlo hi

Mi khat midang khat tungah a khialh leh ama-a' dingin thukhente in palai sem ding hi. Ahih hangin mi khat Topa' tungah khial leh ama-a' dingin kua in va thumsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in a pa' thu ngailo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amaute a thahna dingin Topa' deihna ahi hi
Tu-in naupang Samuel a pumpi khangin Topa leh mite' maipha a ngahtoto hi

Tua ciangin Pasian' mi khat Eli' kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt gamsung Faro' khutnuai-ah na pupi Aaron leh a innkuante a om laitakin Aaron' tungah keimah ka kilang hi

Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin amah ka siampi ahi ding, ka biakna tau-ah a pai ding, paknamtui a hal ding, keima mai-ah siampipuan a silh dingin ka teel hi. Israel mite' tung panin mei tawh kihal keimah hong kibiaknate khempeuh na pupi innkuan tungah ka pia hi

Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keimah hong kibiaknate leh ka thupiak ahi keimah hong kipiakte thusim loin, keima mi Israel-te' piak a limci pen teng tawh note kithausakin, kei sangin na tapate pahtawi zaw na hi hiam?’ ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te' Pasian, Topa in thu hong genin: ‘Nangma innkuan leh na behte keima mai-ah sungtumin pusuak tawntung ding hi, ci-in thu ka ciamsa hi,’ ci hi. Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in thu genin: ‘Tua bang hi nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong pahtawite ka pahtawi ding a, kei hong simmawhte ka simmawh ding hi
En in, nangma innkuan sung leh na beh sunga tangval hat khempeuh ka suksiat hun hong tung ding a, na innkuan sungah puteekte a om nawnloh hun hong tung ding hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah ka piak daupainate khempeuh na lungkham hunin en'na mit tawh na en ding a, na innkuan sungah puteek om ngei nawnlo ding hi
Ka biakna tau panin ka suksiatloh na suante khat pen mitlawt dongin a kap ding leh a lunggim dingin kikoih ding hi. Tua ciangin na innsung panin a khang khempeuh, mite' namsau tawh si ding uh hi
Na tapa nihte, Hofni leh Finehas tungah hong tung ding hih thu pen nang-a' dingin lim hi ding hi. Amaute gel a ni kikhatin si ding uh hi

Tua ciangin ka lungsim sung leh ka ngaihsutna bangin a sem ding a citak siampi khat keima-a' dingin ka khangsak ding hi. Amah, suanlekhak nei-in ka bawl ding a, ka sathau nilhpa' mai-ah amah sungtumin pusuak tawntung ding hi

Na suanlekhak a suakta mite khempeuh ngun peek khat ahi a, anlum lum khat ngen ding ahi zongin ama kiangah pai-in, “An tawm ka neih theihna dingin siampipa' omna mun khat peuhpeuhah kei hong koih in, ci-in kong thum hi,” ci ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi.
